next_handler.name: Finnn AI
next_handler.context: Stable cut v0.8.0. Wave 1 + Wave 2 of the AP/AR build-out (per coassisted-workspace-ap-roadmap-2026-04-30): AP-3 4-tier GL classifier, AP-2 AMEX + WEX → Workday Journal EIB writer, AP-5 7-tier project router, AP-6 Drive tree manager, AP-4 capture sweep routing layer. 13 new MCP tools, ~112 new tests, ~6,200 LOC. Push to GitHub at tag v0.8.0.

focus_area: AP/AR Wave 1 + Wave 2 build (AP-2, AP-3, AP-4 routing, AP-5, AP-6)

tests.note: Run locally to verify; sandbox can't reach venv.

open_tasks.summary: Workday Supplier Invoice EIB exporter — gated on GL → Spend Category map from Workday config (col 113 of Submit_Supplier_Invoice_v39.1).
open_tasks.blocker: Need the GL → Spend Category mapping table from Workday.

open_tasks.summary: Wire 4 stubbed call sites in ap_sweep.py to existing tools/gmail (download_attachment, modify_labels) + tools/chat (send_message). ~1 hour.
Wire project_router._geotab_tiebreaker when GEOTAB_* credentials land in config.json.
Wave 3 build — customer invoice generation, aging, collections cadence. Mirror of vendor follow-up loop on receivables side.
Slack integration — parity with chat_* surface. Joshua deferred until real need surfaces.

recent_changes_summary: Bump to 0.7.3-dev for AP/AR build-out per coassisted-workspace-ap-roadmap-2026-04-30 design doc.

AP-3 (gl_classifier.py + 3 helper modules): 4-tier GL classifier ladder. Tier 0 operator merchant map, Tier 1 MCC table (40 ranges → 11 GL accounts), Tier 2 JE-trained Naive-Bayes-lite (4,601 docs from Wolfhound JEs, debit-side expenses only), Tier 3 Claude-haiku fallback over 29 curated AP-relevant accounts. 58 tests.

AP-2 (workday_journal_eib.py): AMEX + WEX statement parsers + two-sheet Workday Journal EIB writer matching SFNA AMEX EIB convention. Real-data validation: 392 April transactions → 100% classified, 0 fell through. 22 tests.
cost_center_map.py: persistent cardholder/department → cost center store. derive_from_je_corpus() for operator-confirmed seeding.

tools/ap_journal.py: 7 MCP tools (workflow_reconcile_card_statement, workflow_gl_classify_preview, workflow_gl_merchant_map_set/list, workflow_gl_memo_index_status, workflow_cost_center_map_set/list).
AP-6 (ap_tree.py): register_new_project (full 7-subfolder subtree creation, idempotent), ensure_month_subtree (lazy bucket creation), audit_filing_tree (daily scan for manual additions).

AP-5 (project_router.py): 7-tier resolution (explicit → alias → team email → calendar → Geotab stub → LLM → chat picker). confidence_action() maps to auto_file / auto_file_flag / chat_picker / triage. 21 tests.

project_registry.py extended with Wave 2 fields (drive folders, name aliases, assigned team, StaffWizard job link, billing config, customer email) + new resolution helpers (resolve_by_alias, resolve_by_team_email, resolve_by_staffwizard_job).
AP-4 (ap_sweep.py): pure decide_disposition + run_sweep_cycle orchestrator. Routing decisions deterministic; Drive download / mark-read / chat-post stubbed for follow-up wire-up. 11 tests.

tools/ap_tree.py: 6 MCP tools (workflow_register_new_project, workflow_audit_filing_tree, workflow_ensure_month_subtree, workflow_route_project, workflow_project_registry_list, workflow_ap_sweep_cycle).
Total: 12 new modules, 13 new MCP tools, ~112 new tests, ~6,200 LOC added since v0.7.2.
pick_up_here: AP-4 wire-up is the smallest remaining piece (~1 hr). After that, AP-1 needs the Workday GL → Spend Category map. Once both ship, cut v0.8.1 stable. AR-9 (Wave 3) is the next big build.
instructions_for_next_handler: Read HANDOFF_LOG.md latest entry first (2026-05-01 AP/AR Wave 1 + Wave 2 build).
Read coassisted-workspace-ap-roadmap-2026-04-30.md on the operator's Desktop for the AP/AR vision.
Read mcp-audit-2026-04-29.md and mcp-design-docs-2026-04-29.md for legacy backlog.
Bump VERSION in _version.py + pyproject.toml if you ship features (e.g. 0.8.1-dev).
Append a new entry to HANDOFF_LOG.md before handing off.
Run `make test-fast` and record pass/fail in your log entry.
Commit each spec as a discrete git commit with the spec id (e.g. 'AP-4 wire-up: ap_sweep stubs').
